subject: Kikaonde
coverageNote: Form directories exist only where teaching-module source PDFs were ingested. Missing forms must resolve as known-gap, not empty objects.

lesson.title: Nyimbo ya neema mambo yileeta baantu pamo ne kwibalengela kukwantankana.
topics: b. Nyimbo ya nema mambo mu nyimbo muji mafunjisho.
c. Kabiji nyimbo ya neema mambo ileta lusangajiko ku bantu.
